RULING - A R G U E D. Defendant argues continuance, depositions and discovery. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER HANSON, HANSON LAW FIRM P.C.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication.

Defendants Christopher Hanson and Hanson Law Firm, P.C.'s motion for summary judgment or in the alternative, summary adjudication is continued per CCP 437c(h) to January 30, 2019 to permit the Trustee to conduct discovery and file supplemental opposition papers. Supplemental opposition papers must be filed no later than January 11, 2019 and supplemental reply papers must be filed no later than January 23, 2019. The bankruptcy issues stalled the discovery process and the Trustee has had little opportunity to conduct discovery. There is no legal prejudice to the Hanson defendants in continuing the hearing. If the Hanson parties prefer, they can withdraw this motion and file a new summary motion.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)
